title: MOBILE SHOWERS AND HYGIENE - 211info
text: CULTIVATE INITIATIVES AT ALL SAINTS EPISCOPAL CHURCH MOBILE SHOWERS AND HYGIENE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a mobile van for showers, clothing, hygiene products, health education, and provider referrals. Some services are conducted by nursing students and depend on volunteers. 4033 SE Woodstock Boulevard Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Saturday 11am-2pm Email Get Directions Visit Website Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 19 and 75 Services: General Clothing Provision Mobile Health Care Personal/Grooming Supplies Public Showers/Baths If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
